iteration_127_actions.description: Swarm iteration 127 - Verified ollama-proxy CI fix from iter 126, upgraded CI to support Go 1.25 + golangci-lint v2, triggered dependabot rebase
actions_taken: ✅ Scanned all 193 repos for CI status
✅ Confirmed ollama-proxy CI fix from iteration 126 is passing on main
✅ Diagnosed ollama-proxy PR #4 failures: golangci-lint v1 incompatible with Go 1.25, covdata tool missing
✅ Upgraded ollama-proxy ci.yml: setup-go now uses go-version-file: go.mod (not hardcoded)
✅ Upgraded golangci-lint-action v6→v7 (golangci-lint v2 supports Go 1.25)
✅ Migrated .golangci.yml to v2 format (version field, settings, exclusions, output.formats)
✅ Removed deprecated exportloopref linter, deprecated govet.check-shadowing, run.skip-dirs
✅ Pushed CI fix to ollama-proxy main (commit 06cf6d7)
✅ Triggered @dependabot rebase on PR #4 to pick up CI fix
✅ CI + CICD + dependabot rebase runs all in progress
✅ Verified all 15 open issues have AI responses
✅ No new CI failures detected across any repos

fixes_applied.description: Upgraded CI for Go 1.25 + golangci-lint v2 compatibility
root_causes: golangci-lint v1.64.8 (Go 1.24) cannot lint Go 1.25 code
Hardcoded go-version: 1.24 prevents PR branch from using Go 1.25
.golangci.yml used deprecated v1 config format (run.skip-dirs, output.format, govet.check-shadowing, exportloopref)

pending_merges.title: Bump golang.org/x/net from 0.48.0 to 0.55.0
pending_merges.note: Should pass after rebase picks up ci.yml + .golangci.yml fixes

ollama-proxy.note: Main CI passing (iter 126 fix verified). PR #4 dependabot rebase in progress with Go 1.25 CI fixes. Pending verification.

repo_health.note: ollama-proxy now passing on main (verified). PR #4 CI in progress after Go 1.25 fix. 10 'failing' repos are all non-code issues. Actual code CI pass rate: 176/183 repos-with-CI = 96.2%.

If ollama-proxy PR #4 CI passes after rebase, merge it
